title: Helping with Homework 辅导作业

lines.en: Dad, can you help me with my math homework?
lines.zh: 爸爸，你能帮我做数学作业吗？

lines.en: Of course. Which question is hard?
This word problem. I do not understand it.
Let me read it. OK, you need to find the total cost.
lines.zh: 我读一下。好的，你需要算出总价。

lines.en: There are three pencils at two yuan each. Right?
lines.zh: 三支铅笔，每支两元。对吗？

lines.en: Yes. So how much is three times two?
lines.zh: 对。那三乘以二等于多少？

lines.en: Six yuan. Oh, that is easy!
Now add the notebook which costs five yuan.
lines.zh: 现在加上五元的笔记本。

lines.en: Six plus five is eleven. The answer is eleven yuan!
lines.zh: 六加五等于十一。答案是十一元！

lines.en: Great job! You just needed to read it more carefully.
lines.zh: 做得好！你只需要更仔细地读题。
